market_context.note: MARKET REBOUND - intraday volatility, stop-loss levels no longer breached

decision.reasoning: Market has rebounded significantly from 14:35 UTC lows. IWM recovered from -5.61% to -4.51% (no longer breaching stop-loss). FEZ recovered from -4.96% to -3.86%. Portfolio drawdown improved from -4.07% to -3.13%. This validates the decision to hold through intraday volatility and evaluate stops at daily close. No position currently breaching -5% threshold. Continuing to hold all positions.
decision.risk_assessment: Improving - intraday volatility settling, no stop-losses currently breached
decision.lesson_validated: Intraday stop-loss evaluation would have caused unnecessary exit at market bottom. Daily close evaluation prevented whipsaw loss.
